summary: Iteration 259 — Preventivatore AI Analysis Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed. Verified: 1) Grigliato weight calculation correct (~883 kg for 5 panels 1892x6100 maglia 63x132/25x2, NOT 13000+), 2) Conto lavoro materials detected with peso_calcolato_kg=0, 3) Specchiature grigliato dimensions extracted from text (L2230xH2150, etc.) with weight > 300 kg, 4) ore_stimate field present in preventivo lines and API response. Frontend verified: 'h' column header visible, ore_stimate input functional.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Preventivo editor loads, 'h' column visible, ore_stimate input functional)

seed_data_creation: Used demo session for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preventivatore AI analysis fixes verified. Key findings: 1) calcola_peso_materiale function correctly calculates grigliato weight using kg/m² (not steel density). 2) _estrai_area_da_testo extracts multiple LxH dimensions from text. 3) Conto lavoro detection works both via tipo flag and description keywords. 4) ore_stimate_utente field captured in analizza-righe response. 5) All regression tests for IPE/HEA profiles pass. WeasyPrint is MOCKED.
